name: Cassiar Gold Corp.
description: Cassiar Gold Corp. is a Canadian gold exploration company focused on its 100%-owned Cassiar Gold Property located in northern British Columbia, Canada. The property spans 59,000 hectares and hosts two major gold deposits: the Taurus bulk-tonnage gold deposit and the high-grade Cassiar South vein targets. The company is committed to advancing these assets through systematic exploration and drilling programs, leveraging excellent local infrastructure and historical mining data to unlock significant value for its shareholders.
